title: The Straw Hats See Their New Bounties
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on the straw hats see their new bounties within the The World Reacts to Doflamingo's Fall storyline.
scene: Dressrosa's aftermath spreads outward: civilians, rulers, Marines, Doflamingo, Jack, and the Straw Hats all react to the new political balance.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oi, Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It looks like our bounties have shot up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What!? Seriously!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh my! Were you not aware?

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Well, I've got the wanted posters hung up in my room, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please, this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please, please!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oi! Trafalgar! I threw yours out in the trash but just in case you were wondering, it went up to 500 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Oh. Thanks. This is me caring.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Feast yer eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: you... framed them!?

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: I've also got those signatures you gave me earlier over here on the side!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy bounty 500 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hehe! ol, anyone got any sake!?

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Devil Child Rico Robin bounty 130 million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: SOO million! Yahoo!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: pirate Hunter Zoro bounty 320 Million.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, how terrible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's gone up again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Almost broke 100, damn it! And why is the damn picture of general frankly!?

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: CyBorg Franky Bounty 94 million.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You gotta be kidding me! Why the hell did yours go up so much!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the only one that hasn't broken 100 million! That's utter crap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're gonna be gunning for me now! But... it does make me happy! Although they could have used a more flattering photo!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: GOD USOPP BOUNTY 200 MILLION.5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guah! Even my crewmates are gunning for me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait! We've still got Nami and the others' left!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa! Sanji's poster doesn't have that portrait on it any- more!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Black leg Sanji bounty 177 million©

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Boooo- Ooring!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Cat burglar Nami Bounty 66 million§

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Again with some type of glamour shot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I have no words for this one!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Soul King Brook Bounty 83 Million§

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Cotton-Candy- Loving Chopper bounty 100 😉

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a poster for one of his concerts, isn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aside from those of you that were involved in this incident and showed the world how dangerous you are,

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Everyone's bounty's gone up by an even so million! Ours have gone up by that much too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Also, take a look at this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The way black leg Sanji-Senpai's amount's gone up, and the poster itself, seem a bit... off!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Hm? The bounty's only valid if he's alive!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What's the deal with Sanji?

summary: The Straw Hats See Their New Bounties: Dressrosa begins to heal while Doflamingo's capture sends shockwaves through the seas, from the Marines to Jack and the Straw Hats' new bounties.
